title: ppi_v1 — PPI sub-axis output rows
description: Output schema for _python_bridge/module/ppi_sim.py. One row per protein-protein interface class: the alanine-scanning ddG ledger, the Bogan-Thorn hotspot fraction, the interface dg_bind and the hotspot-mimicry gate for a small-molecule PPI inhibitor, anchored to the Bogan-Thorn binding-hotspot theory (J. Mol. Biol. 280:1, 1998). PPI is a SUB-AXIS :> QUANTUM core (AXIS/HIERARCHY.tape) — recorded as a borderline sub (score-main-eligible, QUANTUM-applicability tension flagged) — NOT a hexa-bio core-5 axis. In-silico simulator-consistency only (AGENTS.tape g8/f2).

interface.description: Interface identifier within the deterministic panel.

interface_class.description: Protein-protein interface structural class (bh3_helix_groove, alpha_helix_peptide_cleft, flat_diffuse_interface, etc.).

drug_precedent.description: Own drug precedent for the modality (g3/f1 — described by precedent, never lattice-derived).

alanine_scan_ddg_kcal_per_mol.description: Per-residue alanine-scanning ddG values (kcal/mol, >=0) — binding free energy lost on residue->Ala mutation.

hotspot_ddg_threshold_kcal_per_mol.description: Bogan-Thorn hotspot threshold — a residue is a hotspot iff its alanine-scan ddG is at least this.

n_interface_residues.description: Number of interface residues in the alanine-scan ledger.

n_hotspot_residues.description: Number of residues meeting the Bogan-Thorn hotspot threshold.

sum_ddg_kcal_per_mol.description: Sum of all per-residue alanine-scan ddG values (kcal/mol).

sum_hotspot_ddg_kcal_per_mol.description: Sum of the hotspot-residue ddG values (kcal/mol).

hotspot_energy_fraction.description: Fraction of the total interface ddG carried by the hotspot residues.

dg_hotspot_cluster_kcal_per_mol.description: Binding free energy carried by the dominant hotspot cluster = -sum_hotspot_ddg (kcal/mol).

mimicry_fraction.description: Fraction of the hotspot-cluster energy a small-molecule mimic recovers.

dg_mimic_kcal_per_mol.description: Mimicked free energy of the small-molecule PPI inhibitor = mimicry_fraction * dg_hotspot_cluster (kcal/mol).

mimicry_dg_threshold_kcal_per_mol.description: Hotspot-mimicry viability threshold for small-molecule interface disruption (kcal/mol).

small_molecule_disruption_viable.description: True iff the mimicked free energy meets the hotspot-mimicry viability gate.

ledger_residual_kcal_per_mol.description: Residual of the hotspot + non-hotspot = total ddG ledger cross-check; numerical-consistency gate.

mimic_within_ledger.description: True iff the mimicked energy does not exceed the hotspot-cluster energy the interface actually carries (real-limit respected).

hotspot_driven.description: True iff the hotspot fraction is at least 0.5 and there are at least 2 hotspot residues.
